uses: One pull from the ★3 guaranteed "5th NEW GATE" character gacha

name: "Cinderella Gray" Anime ★3 Exchange Ticket
description: A voucher that can be exchanged for a ★3 character of your liking from a list.
uses: Obtaining a ★3 character of your choice from a list.

name: Scout Points
description: Obtained by participating in the Aim for the Stars! Dream Team Scout Race. Used to scout team members.
uses: Recruiting new team members in the "Aim for the Strongest Team!" event
how_to_get: Participating in scouting races during the "Aim for the Strongest Team!" event

name: Scout Race Ticket
description: A ticket for entry in the Aim for the Stars! Dream Team Scout Race. Does not carry over to the next event.
uses: Participate in scouting races during the "Aim for the Strongest Team!" event
how_to_get: Daily reset during the "Aim for the Strongest Team!" event
Consuming Carrot Jelly during the "Aim for the Strongest Team!" event

name: League Ticket
description: A ticket for entry in a League of Heroes race. Does not carry over to the next event.
uses: Participating in Main Stage races of the League of Heroes
how_to_get: Automatically obtained at noon (server time) when the League of Heroes is underway

name: Spark Strenghtening Report
description: A paper on the spark of horsegirls.
uses: Raising the number of stars for a Stat, Aptitude or Unique Skill spark by one (maximum 3)
